modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Enabling date and time restrictions on Lockdown Browser in D2L

full_description_text: 
During a call, the user asked how to set up date and time restrictions for the Lockdown Browser in D2L. They were unsure about the steps needed to implement these restrictions effectively. The user seemed to be familiar with the platform but needed clarification on the specific process to follow.
short_description: Enabling date and time restrictions on Lockdown Browser in D2L
description: During a call, the user asked how to set up date and time restrictions for the Lockdown Browser in D2L. They were unsure about the steps needed to implement these restrictions effectively. The user seemed to be familiar with the platform but needed clarification on the specific process to follow.
